articles.name: [Known Issue] Desktop Client Crashing When Starting a Game on AMD Graphics Cards
articles.title: [Known Issue] Desktop Client Crashing When Starting a Game on AMD Graphics Cards
articles.body:
On May 10, 2026, we identified an issue causing the Discord desktop client to crash, close, or refresh on its own when users start a game. The cause is a regression in AMD's 26.5.1 graphics driver release. We are working with AMD, who is actively investigating. 

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Who is affected by this issue?

A: Windows users running AMD graphics driver version 26.5.1 (also identified as 32.0.31007.1017) are affected.

Q: When will this issue be fixed?

A: We do not have an ETA at this time. This article will be updated with any relevant information we receive from our partners at AMD. 

Q: What can I do in the meantime?

A: A clean driver reinstall may resolve the issue. For instructions, refer to AMD's official driver installation guidance. AMD publishes driver updates through AMD Software: Adrenaline Edition, and a fixed release may be available there in the future.

articles.name: Archived Version: Discord Advertising IAB Addendum - May 25 2025
articles.title: Archived Version: Discord Advertising IAB Addendum - May 25 2025
articles.body:
Archived Version: This version of the Discord Addendum is archived as of May 12, 2026. You can find the current version of Discord Advertising IAB Addendum here.

Updated May 12, 2026

This Discord Advertising IAB Addendum (this “Discord Addendum”), which amends and supplements the IAB STANDARD TERMS AND CONDITIONS FOR INTERNET ADVERTISING FOR MEDIA BUYS ONE YEAR OR LESS VERSION 3.0 (the “IAB Terms” and collectively with this Discord Addendum, the “Campaign Terms”), governs and forms a part of any applicable insertion order  (the “IO”) signed by and between Discord Inc. (“Media Company”) and the advertiser designated on an IO (“Advertiser”), or, if applicable, Advertiser’s agency designated on an IO (“Agency”).  The terms of this Discord Addendum will control over and fully supersede any similar, conflicting, inconsistent or overlapping terms in the IAB Terms or other parts of an IO; however, if an IO expressly states that certain terms set forth in the IO are intended to supersede the terms of this Discord Addendum, then, in the event of conflict, those terms of the applicable IO will control only for that IO and only to the extent of such conflict. Any purchase order terms, “clickthrough” or other online agreements, or other similar documents made available to Media Company by Advertiser or Agency are hereby rejected by Media Company and will not apply to any Quest. Capitalized terms used but not defined herein will have the meanings given to such terms in the IAB Terms. 

Where Advertiser is purchasing directly from Media Company, (i) Section 2 and any references to Agency herein will be deemed deleted and will not apply; and (ii) all references in the IAB Terms to Agency, will be deemed to be references to Advertiser.

1. Quest Terms.

a. Quests. Media Company will implement a promotional campaign on its platform (the “Discord Platform”) for Advertiser’s applicable property designated on an IO (the “Advertiser Property”) where eligible users of the Discord Platform will be able to complete certain agreed-upon tasks relating to the Advertiser Property and earn certain agreed-upon rewards (“Rewards”), as further detailed in an applicable IO (each such campaign, a “Quest”).  

b. Quest T&Cs. Media Company will, in consultation with Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, establish the specific terms and requirements for users governing each Quest (“Quest T&Cs”), and will publish the Quest T&Cs to users in connection with such Quest. The Quest T&Cs will address, at a minimum (i) user eligibility requirements and any criteria and tasks that must be satisfied by a user in order to receive a Reward; (ii) the nature of the applicable Reward, including whether the Reward will be supplied by Media Company (each, a “Media Company Reward”) or Advertiser (each, an “Advertiser Reward”); and (iv) any other terms, conditions and limitations pertaining to the redemption and use of the Reward.  

c. Advertiser Rewards. Unless otherwise indicated on an IO, the Reward will be an Advertiser Reward approved by Media Company and either the Advertiser or Agency, as applicable. For any Quest with an Advertiser Reward: (i) reasonably in advance of the applicable flight dates for a Quest, the parties will agree in writing (email to suffice) on and implement the fulfillment and redemption mechanics for the Advertiser Reward, which may consist of the delivery to Media Company of a sufficient number of redemption codes for users to redeem for Advertiser Rewards; (ii) Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, will ensure that the Advertiser Reward and the redemption process is consistent with the Quest T&Cs; and (iii) in the event of any fulfillment or redemption issues (including, without limitation, insufficient or defective redemption codes) in connection with a Quest, Media Company may suspend such Quest until such issues are resolved.  For clarity, Advertiser is solely responsible for the Advertiser Rewards and any associated fraud, losses, or other issues in connection with such Advertiser Rewards. 

d. Media Company Rewards.  For any Quest where the applicable IO indicates there will be a Media Company Reward, Media Company will (i) ensure that such Media Company Reward and redemption process is consistent with the Quest T&Cs; and (ii) will have responsibility (unless otherwise agreed in the IO) and control over the design and creation of such Media Company Reward. Media Company will obtain Advertiser’s or Agency’s approval (not to be unreasonably withheld) for any Media Company Reward that contains or is derived from Advertising Materials. Media Company Rewards may not be available to users in certain regions where not supported by the Discord Platform. Advertiser and Agency may not terminate for convenience any Quest with (i) a Media Company Reward that contains or is derived from Advertising Materials (“Custom Reward”) or (ii) any other custom Media Company Reward created specifically for the Quest. Where there is a Custom Reward, Advertiser, or Agency on behalf of Advertiser, grants Discord a worldwide, royalty-free, perpetual license in and to the Custom Reward to provide it to Discord Nitro users. 

e. Advertiser Marks License. 

i. Advertiser and Agency hereby grant Media Company a limited, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use and display Advertiser’s name, designated trademarks and associated logos, and any names, trademarks or logos associated with the Advertiser Property (the “Advertiser Marks”) in connection with the implementation of a Quest, the performance of Media Company’s obligations under the Campaign Terms and any IO, or as otherwise approved in writing by Advertiser or Agency. 

ii. All goodwill and improved reputation generated by Media Company’s use of the Advertiser Marks inures to the exclusive benefit of Advertiser. Media Company will use the Advertiser Marks in a manner consistent with any branding guidelines provided by Advertiser to Media Company in writing.

f. Advertising Materials.  Advertiser and Agency hereby grant Media Company a limited, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, adapt, translate, modify, copy, publicly perform, transmit and distribute the Advertising Materials in connection with the implementation or promotion of a Quest, the performance of Media Company’s obligations under the Campaign Terms or as otherwise approved by Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, including, without limitation, in connection with the development, distribution and making available of applicable Media Company Rewards containing or derived from such Advertising Materials. The licenses set forth herein are sublicensable by Media Company to its affiliates, agents, and subcontractors in connection with Media Company performance hereunder (and, with respect to Media Company Rewards containing or derived from Advertising Materials, to end users who claim any such Media Company Rewards in connection with a Quest). Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, will, at its own cost and expense, obtain all necessary licenses, consents, approvals and permissions from any third party required for Media Company to exercise its rights under the foregoing license. For purposes of the Campaign Terms, “Advertising Materials” means any content, materials, copy, branding, images, names, audio, music, video, artwork, designs, descriptions, specifications, and other elements made available by Advertiser or Agency to Media Company for use in connection with a Quest, including, without limitation, any elements, materials, assets or intellectual property from the Advertiser Property. 

g. Cooperation.  Media Company’s ability to implement the Quest and its obligations under the Campaign Terms and any IO (including, without limitation, the ability to meet the applicable timeframes and schedules for a Quest as specified in an IO) will be contingent upon the timely provision of cooperation from Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, in connection with the Quest, which cooperation includes, without limitation, providing any redemption codes, Advertising Materials and/or Advertiser Rewards as required by Media Company with sufficient lead time for the applicable Quest, compliance with applicable Policies or other campaign and asset specifications, and timely feedback, reviews and approvals for any items and matters requiring approval or input in connection with a Quest. Advertiser and Agency will adhere to any Policies and other agreed upon timeframes, campaign specifications, and development schedules in connection with the foregoing. Media Company will not be liable or responsible for any delays or issues caused by Advertiser’s or Agency’s failure or delay in providing such cooperation.

h. Quest Prompts.  Media Company will be responsible for developing, producing, and displaying prompts or notifications promoting the availability of a Quest (“Quest Prompts”) to certain users on applicable surfaces within the Discord Platform. Notwithstanding anything to the contrary, Media Company will have ultimate authority and control over the content, placement, frequency, delivery, timing and accompanying disclosures in connection with all Quest Prompts on the Discord Platform. Media Company reserves the right to suspend or cancel the targeting, personalization, and/or delivery of Quest Prompts in connection with any Quest.  

i. Reporting.  For each Quest, Media Company will provide summary reports to Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, regarding certain estimated performance metrics, insights and KPIs within a reasonable timeframe after the midpoint and end date of such Quest. The information in such reports may be used by Advertiser solely for its own internal business purposes but will otherwise be considered Media Company’s Confidential Information. 

j. Estimates.  Notwithstanding anything to the contrary, any impression or reach numbers, impression-related commitments, targeting parameters, geographies or estimates provided on an IO and any information provided in connection with any report delivered by Media Company with respect to any Quest are provided by Media Company solely on an “AS IS” basis as estimates for informational purposes based on the data reasonably available to Media Company and are not guaranteed or considered binding by the parties in connection with any Quest. Media Company will not be liable (or required to offer any makegood) for any errors, shortfalls, inaccuracies or omissions in connection with any of the foregoing.

2. Agency Authority.  Agency represents, warrants and covenants that it has obtained and will maintain all consents, approvals and authorizations from Advertiser necessary for Agency to (i) bind Advertiser to the Campaign Terms and any IO, act on behalf of Advertiser and otherwise comply with its obligations in connection with the Campaign Terms and any IO, including, without limitation, with respect to (a) the execution of any IOs on Advertiser’s behalf, (b) the ability to pay Media Company for any Quest; (c) the ability to share Advertiser’s Confidential Information with Media Company; and (c) the management and provision of any and all approvals, feedback and reviews in connection with the Campaign Terms and any IO (e.g., the review and approval of Rewards and other Quest elements, press releases, promotional materials, or creative assets); and (ii) grant the licenses set forth in the Campaign Terms and any IO, including, without limitation, any such licenses to Advertiser Marks and Advertising Materials set forth herein. Media Company will be entitled to rely on any documents executed, instructions provided or approvals granted by Agency on an Advertiser’s behalf in connection with the Campaign Terms and any IO. Agency will indemnify and hold Media Company harmless from and against any losses or unpaid obligations under any IOs arising from Agency’s violation of this Section. 

3. Taxes. Unless otherwise stated in an IO, Media Company’s fees do not include any direct or indirect local, state, federal or foreign taxes, levies, duties or similar governmental assessments of any nature, including value-added, use, sales or withholding taxes collected by any jurisdiction. Each party is responsible for all of its own business taxes (including, but not limited to, net income, gross receipts, franchise, or other similar business taxes) arising as a result of or in connection with any IO. Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, is responsible for self-assessing any transaction taxes (e.g. sales tax, VAT, GST or similar taxes) due with respect to any IO. Media Company will collect, and Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, will pay any applicable transaction taxes if Media Company determines that it has a duty to collect such taxes. Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, is responsible for any transaction taxes on user rewards redeemed outside of the Discord Platform. For transaction tax purposes, Quests will be treated as services related to promotional advertising campaigns. To the extent withholding tax is required by applicable law, Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, will be responsible for collecting and remitting such taxes to the appropriate tax authorities. Additionally, Advertiser or Agency, as applicable, will provide Media Company an original receipt or documentation from the tax authority for the withholding tax payments.

4. Amendments to IAB Terms. 

a. General Acknowledgements.  The parties acknowledge and agree that: (i) Quests are treated as flat-fee based Deliverables delivered on the Discord Platform for purposes of the IAB Terms; (ii) the terms of the IAB Terms relating to inventory availability, delivery schedule, ad placement and positioning, use of collected data, and reporting will be superseded and governed by the applicable terms of Section 1 of this Discord Addendum and any IO; and (iii) Quests do not use or involve any Third Party Ad Server and any associated terms in the IAB Terms do not apply.

b. Specific Amendments. 

i. Section X(b) of the IAB Terms is hereby amended to add the following new subclauses (iv) and (v):

“(iv) allegations that the Advertising Materials or Advertiser Marks infringe, misappropriate or otherwise violate any intellectual property rights of a third party; or (v) Advertiser Rewards, including, without limitation, any claims from users that Advertiser Rewards were misleading or inaccurate or that they were not properly fulfilled.”

ii. Section XI of the IAB Terms is hereby amended and restated as follows:

“Excluding Agency’s, Advertiser’s, and Media Company’s respective indemnification obligations under the Campaign Terms, damages that result from a breach of Section XII, or intentional misconduct by Agency, Advertiser, or Media Company, in no event will any party be liable (i) for any consequential, indirect, incidental, punitive, special, or exemplary damages whatsoever or any damages for loss of profits, business interruption, loss of information, and the like, incurred by another party arising out of an IO, even if such party has been advised of the possibility of such damages; or (ii) in the aggregate in connection with these Campaign Terms or the IO in excess of the amount paid or payable by Agency or Advertiser to Media Company hereunder.”

iii. For purposes of Section XIV(d) of the IAB Terms, the choice of law governing any IO will be the State of New York without reference to its choice of law rules, and all claims, legal proceedings or litigations arising in connection with the Campaign Terms will be brought solely in state and federal courts located in New York City.

iv. Section XIV.e of the IAB Terms is hereby amended and restated as follows:

“All notices of termination or breach must be in English, in writing and addressed to the other party’s legal department (with a copy to any contact listed on an IO). The email address for notices being sent to the Media Company legal department is legal.notices@discordapp.com. All other notices must be in English, in writing (including email) and addressed to the other party’s applicable notice information designated on an IO. Notice will be treated as given on receipt, as verified by written or automated receipt or by electronic log (as applicable).”

articles.name: [Known Issue] Audio Issues when Screensharing on Android
articles.title: [Known Issue] Audio Issues when Screensharing on Android
articles.body:
On May 4, 2026, we identified an issue with sound share while screensharing on Android. Due to a potential bug in Android System WebView, advertisements embedded in screenshared apps can break the audio capture pipeline, sending silence to viewers within Discord. Our partners at Google are working to find a root cause for this bug and develop a fix.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What platforms are affected?

A: Android is affected system-wide: any app (including Discord) that supports screensharing on Android is affected by this same bug. iOS, Windows, Linux, and macOS are not affected.

Q: When will this be fixed?

A: We do not have an ETA at this time. This article will be updated with any relevant information we receive from our partners at Google.

Q: What can I do in the meantime?

A: As a temporary workaround, uninstalling updates for Android System WebView should resolve this issue. Navigate to Settings > Apps > See all [number] apps > Android System WebView, tap the three dots in the top right, then tap “Uninstall updates”.

This workaround may cause other unknown issues, so we recommend keeping an eye out. If you encounter new issues, please reinstall updates from the Play Store.

articles.name: Game Shops FAQ
articles.title: Game Shops FAQ
articles.body:
Buy, gift, and wishlist in-game items for your favorite games directly on Discord. Browse items in the Discord Shop or in a game's official server, gift items to friends in just a few clicks, and add items to your Wishlist so friends know exactly what to get you. This article covers everything you need to know about how it all works.

Rust Players: If you made a purchase and didn't get your item after linking, please launch Rust and re-link your Discord account from inside the game. You can do this by clicking 'Social' in the bottom right, then 'Find your Friends on Discord'. See details on how to link your Discord account here. 

What this article covers:

  • What Are Game Shops?
  • Where To Find In-Game Items On Discord
    • Through the Discord Shop
    • Through a Game's Official Server
  • How to Purchase Items
  • Gifting Items
    • Other Ways to Gift
  • Frequently Asked Questions
    • Purchases and Refunds
    • Pricing
    • Gifting
    • Account Linking
    • General
    • Marvel Rivals Shop
    • Rust Shop

What Are Game Shops?

Game Shops let you browse, purchase, and gift in-game items directly on Discord. You can find in-game items through the Discord Shop or in a game's official Discord server, and you can gift items to friends from places you're already hanging out, like DMs and voice channels.

Games currently available on Discord:

  • Marvel Rivals: Marvel Rivals Shop
  • Rust: Rust Shop

Where To Find In-Game Items On Discord

Note: Game Shops are currently available on the Discord desktop and web apps. See the Marvel Rivals Shop and Rust Shop sections below for details on which platforms each game supports for item redemption.

There are two ways to find in-game items on Discord:

Through the Discord Shop

1. Navigate to the Discord Shop by selecting the Shop tab [ ] to the right of your server list.

2. Select Game Shops at the top of the Shop.

3. Browse available games and select a game to see its items.
 

Game Shops tab in the Discord Shop

Through a Game's Official Server

1. Visit the game's official Discord server.

2. Select the Game Shop tab towards the top of the server's channel list.

3. You can now browse all available items in the Game Shop.

Game Shop (Example: Marvel Rivals)

How To Purchase Items

Note: The items available in each Game Shop will refresh periodically, so check back to see what's new.

1. Find the item you'd like to purchase, either through the Discord Shop or in the game's official server.

2. Select the item and review details including the price and preview.

Item detail view in a Game Shop 

3. Select Buy Now and follow the prompts to complete your purchase.

4. When you buy an item, it's delivered straight to your in-game inventory. If you've already linked your game account to Discord, you're all set. If not, you'll see a prompt to link your account. Press the Link Account button.

Link Account button

Want to learn more? 
For more information on linking your game account to Discord, check out this Help Center article.

5. Follow the prompts to fully link your account. Once linked, your item will be delivered to your game account!

Launch game

Gifting Items

Want to surprise a friend with an in-game item? You can gift items directly from any Game Shop on Discord.

1. Browse a Game Shop and select an item you'd like to gift.

2. Select the Gift Item button.

3. You can personalize your gift with a custom message.

4. Once you're ready, complete your purchase by following the prompts and send your gift.

Gifting a Marvel Rivals Shop item

5. The recipient will receive the gift in their DMs. Before claiming the gift, they should make sure their game account is linked to their Discord account. After linking, they can claim their gift by selecting Open Gift.

Open Gift button

Other Ways To Gift

Gifting is woven throughout Discord, so you don't always have to go to a Game Shop to give a friend something. Here are some other ways to gift in-game items:

  • From a friend's Wishlist: Open the Wishlist tab on anyone's Discord profile to see which Game Shop items they've been eyeing, and send them a gift right from there.
  • From DMs: Use the gift icon in a DM to send a friend an in-game item.
  • From a link in chat: If someone drops a link to an in-game item in chat, you can gift that item straight from the link.
  • From voice channels: While streaming a game that has a Game Shop in a voice channel, you can gift items to friends right from there.

Frequently Asked Questions

This FAQ is divided into sections:

  • Purchases and Refunds
  • Pricing
  • Gifting
  • Account Linking
  • General
  • Marvel Rivals Shop
  • Rust Shop

Purchases and Refunds

Q: Can I refund a Game Shop purchase? 

A: Generally, purchases in Game Shops are non-refundable. However, if you're unable to claim the in-game item on a supported platform, and you attempt to claim the item within the 14-day claim period, Discord will attempt to automatically process a refund. Check the game-specific sections below for which platforms are supported.

Q: How do I see what items I've purchased? 

A: You can see any purchases on your Billing tab in settings in the 'Transaction History' section.

Q: What happens if I receive a gift of an item I already own in the game? 

A: If you attempt to claim a gifted item that you already own in-game, the gift sender will be refunded. Note that gift receivers must attempt to claim items within 14 days to ensure Discord can issue any eligible refunds.

Q: Why do I see "You already own this item or it's not supported on your platform"?

A: This message appears when you already own the item, your linked game account is on an unsupported platform, or you own an item that's included in a bundle you're trying to purchase. If you already own the item, you'll only be able to purchase it as a gift for someone else.

"You already own this item or it's not supported on your platform" message

Pricing

Q: What currency do Game Shops support? 

A: Prices in Game Shops may be shown in your local currency where available. Otherwise, prices are shown in U.S. dollars (USD).

Gifting

Q: Can I gift items to someone who doesn't play the game? 

A: Yes, you can send a gift to any Discord user. The recipient will need to link their game account to their Discord account to claim the gift. If they don't have a game account yet, they can create one and link it to Discord.

Q: How do I know what my friends want? 

A: You can check a friend's Wishlist on their Discord profile. Open the Wishlist tab to see which items they've saved, and gift them something right from there. You can also add items to your own Wishlist so friends know what to get you. Learn more in our Wishlist FAQ. 

Account Linking

Q: Can I purchase from a Game Shop without linking my account? 

A: Yes, you can purchase from the shop without linking your account, but you will need to link your account to claim the item. You can find the account linking entrance in Settings > Billing > navigate to the item you purchased > Connect Account.

Rust Players: If you made a purchase and didn't get your item after linking, please launch Rust and re-link your Discord account from inside the game. You can do this by clicking 'Social' in the bottom right, then 'Find your Friends on Discord'.

General

Q: Which games have Game Shops on Discord? 

A: Game Shops are currently available for Marvel Rivals and Rust.

Q: Are Game Shops available on mobile? 

A: Game Shops are currently available on the Discord desktop and web apps.

Marvel Rivals Game Shop

Q: Which platforms can I redeem Marvel Rivals Shop items on? 

A: Currently supported on PC desktop platforms (Steam, Epic, Loading Bay) and Xbox. If your connected account is on PlayStation and therefore unable to receive the item, we may offer a refund, provided that you or the gift recipient attempted to claim the item within 14 days of purchase.

Q: Where can I find the Marvel Rivals Shop on Discord? 

A: You can click this link to go directly to the Marvel Rivals Shop on Discord.

Rust Game Shop

Q: I'm having trouble linking my Rust account to receive my item. What should I do?

A: If you made a purchase and didn't receive your item after linking, please launch Rust and re-link your Discord account from inside the game.

1. Launch Rust

2. Select Social in the bottom-right corner

3. Select "Find your friends on Discord" and follow the prompts

This is the recommended linking method for Rust at this time.

Q: Which platforms can I redeem Rust Shop items on? 

A: Currently supported on PC via Steam.

Q: What happens if I receive a Rust item but don't own the game? 

A: The item will be added to your Steam inventory and will be waiting for you when you purchase Rust. Once you own the game on that Steam account, the item will be available to use. The same applies if you gift a Rust item to a friend who doesn't own the game yet.

Q: Where can I find the Rust Shop on Discord? 

A: You can click this link to go directly to the Rust Shop on Discord.

articles.name: Nitro Rewards
articles.title: Nitro Rewards
articles.body:
Nitro is expanding its perks beyond Discord with Nitro Rewards, a third-party benefits program included with your membership. From games to gear, these are perks built for how you play.

What this article covers:

  • What are Nitro Rewards?
  • Xbox Game Pass 
  • Logitech G Discount
    • How it Works
    • Eligibility Requirements
    • How to Access Your Discount Code
  • SteelSeries Discount
    • How it Works
    • Eligibility Requirements
    • How to Access Your Discount Code
  • Frequently Asked Questions

What are Nitro Rewards?

Important: Nitro Rewards are rolling out to eligible members over the coming weeks. If you don't see Nitro Rewards in the Nitro tab yet, they haven't reached your account. All eligible Nitro members will have access soon. Perk availability varies by region. Nitro Basic and Nitro Classic members are not eligible.

Nitro Rewards is a benefits program included with your Nitro membership at no additional cost. It gives members access to perks from partners that matter to people who play games.

Nitro Rewards will evolve and change over time. You can check your Nitro Home to see what's currently available to you. As long as your Nitro membership is active, you'll have access to whatever perks are currently available in your rewards collection.

For a full list of the other perks you get with Nitro, check out What are Nitro & Nitro Basic? Article.

You can access Nitro Rewards through your Nitro Home tab in the Discord desktop app.

Nitro Home tab

Nitro Rewards Program Terms 

Nitro Rewards is included with eligible paid Nitro memberships at no additional cost, giving you access to perks from partners we think you'll actually use. The program is designed to grow and evolve — we'll be updating the partners and offers over time, and what's available may change.

Individual perks have their own eligibility conditions, redemption requirements, and availability limitations, which you'll find described in connection with each perk. Not all perks are available in all regions or to all subscription types. Nitro Basic and Nitro Classic members are not eligible for Nitro Rewards.

Perks provided through Nitro Rewards are supplementary to your core Nitro benefits and are offered in partnership with third parties. Discord isn't responsible for third-party products or services accessed through the program, and the third parties may impose their own terms, restrictions, and limitations.

Access to Nitro Rewards perks requires an active Nitro membership. Some perks, once claimed, may remain valid after your membership ends per the terms applicable to that perk.

Xbox Game Pass 

Take your gaming further with Xbox Game Pass, included with your Nitro membership. Whether you're looking for something new to play or want to stream your existing Xbox library, this benefit puts more gaming within reach — no extra subscription needed.

Your Nitro membership includes:

  • 50+ games like Stardew Valley, DayZ, and Fallout 4
  • 10 hours of cloud gaming each month
  • Play and earn up to $25 a year in the Store with Rewards

This benefit is available to active Nitro subscribers in eligible regions that do not have an existing Xbox Game Pass subscription.

Eligibility Requirements

You are eligible if:

  • You have an active Discord Nitro membership (through a paid membership, Nitro gift, and most Nitro trials)
  • You are not an existing Xbox Game Pass subscriber
  • You are located in an eligible region (see below)

You are not eligible if:

  • Using Nitro Credits without a Nitro subscription. 
  • You are a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic member

Eligible regions for Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition): Australia, Austria, Belgium, Canada, Czech Republic, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Hungary, India, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Mexico, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovakia, South Korea, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Kingdom, United States

See Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition) terms: https://www.xbox.com/legal/starter-edition-terms 

How to Access Xbox Game Pass

Tip: If you have an existing Xbox account connected to Discord but aren't seeing your Xbox Game Pass Nitro benefits, try re-linking your account. This can happen for some users with previously connected accounts. Re-linking should resolve the issue.

1. On desktop or browser, select the Direct Messages icon [] in the upper-left corner. 

2. Press the Nitro Home tab to navigate to the Nitro Rewards page. 

 

Direct Messages Icon (Left) and Nitro Tab (Right)

3. Locate the Xbox Game Pass card or banner and press Claim to open the Xbox Game Pass window.

Claim for free Xbox Game Pass card

5. Follow the prompts to activate your benefit and link your Microsoft account. 

Logitech G Discount  

Important: To receive your code, you must use the desktop app. Eligibility conditions apply, see below for more information.

How it Works

The following terms apply to this promotional offer:

  • Code details and restrictions: Discount codes are valid on most items in each store, including sale items, with no blackout dates. Please note that the Logitech 30% off code excludes new products, the new Pro X2 Superstrike mouse and PRO Series Simulation lines, and is limited to 3 items per order.
  • For new products and PRO series simulation gear items, a 5% discount is available on new products for the first 6 months following a product's release (limited to 1 use per customer). The PRO series simulation gear discount is rolling out to all users in the upcoming days.
  • Immediate availability: Codes become available to eligible users as soon as you subscribe to Nitro and must be claimed in your Nitro Home.
  • Fresh codes monthly: Each calendar month, you can claim a new discount code as long as this reward is available.
  • Code expiration: The code expiration dates can be found in the app. Codes will always expire on that date, no matter when they were granted.
  • No code stacking: Only one code can be used per transaction.
Note: If you cancel your Nitro subscription, you can still use any previously claimed discount codes until they expire, but you won't receive new codes until you resubscribe.

Eligibility Requirements

You are eligible:

  • With an active Discord Nitro subscription (through a paid membership, Nitro gift, and most Nitro trials)
  • If you’re located in a region that Logitech G ships to (see Logitech G regions for details)

You are not eligible if:

  • Using Nitro Credits without a Nitro subscription. 
  • You are a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscriber.
Note: Once you unlock a discount code, you will not be eligible for a refund on your Nitro subscription. See our Refund Policy for more details.

How to Access Your Discount Code

1. On desktop or browser, select the Direct Messages icon [] in the upper-left corner. 

2. Press the Nitro Home tab to navigate to the Nitro page. 

 

Direct Messages Icon (Left) and Nitro Home Tab (Right)

3. Locate and select the Logitech G Discount card under the What’s New? section.

 Logitech G Discount Card

4. Press Unlock Rewards to open the Logitech G Discounts window and see your available codes. 

Unlock Rewards button

5. Select Unlock Code for your preferred discount to reveal your code—you can copy it immediately or return to view it later. 

Unlock Code button in Logitech G Discounts window

Using Your Discount Code

After claiming your discount code, here's how to use it on the Logitech G website:

  1. Visit the Logitech G website
  2. Add items to your cart 
  3. Proceed to checkout
  4. Enter your discount code in the promo code field
  5. Complete your purchase with the discount applied

SteelSeries Discount

Important: To receive your code, you must use the desktop app. Eligibility conditions apply, see below for more information.

How it Works

The following details apply to this promotional offer:

  • Minimum purchase requirements: You must make a minimum subtotal purchase of $20 to use your discount at SteelSeries. There is no minimum purchase requirement for KontrolFreek.
  • Code details and restrictions: Discount codes are valid on most items in each store, including all sale items, with no blackout dates. Please note that the SteelSeries code cannot be applied to the Arctis Nova Elite, Blemished Boxes, and is limited to 3 items per order.
  • Immediate availability: Codes become available to eligible users as soon as you subscribe to Nitro and must be claimed in your Nitro Home.
  • Fresh codes monthly: Each calendar month, you can claim a new discount code as long as this reward is available.
  • Code expiration: The code expiration dates can be found in the app. Codes will always expire on that date, no matter when they were granted.
  • No code stacking: Only one code can be used per transaction.
Note: If you cancel your Nitro subscription, you can still use any previously claimed discount codes until they expire, but you won't receive new codes until you resubscribe.

Eligibility Requirements

You are eligible:

  • With an active Discord Nitro subscription (through a paid membership, Nitro gift, and most Nitro trials)
  • If you’re located in a region that SteelSeries ships to (see SteelSeries regions for details)

You are not eligible if:

  • Using Nitro Credits without a Nitro subscription. 
  • You are a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscriber.
Note: Once you unlock a discount code, you will not be eligible for a refund on your Nitro subscription. See our Refund Policy for more details.

How to Access Your Discount Code

1. On desktop or browser, select the Direct Messages icon [] in the upper-left corner. 

2. Press the Nitro Home tab to navigate to the Nitro page. 

 

Direct Messages Icon (Left) and Nitro Tab (Right)

3. Locate and select the SteelSeries x KontrolFreek Discounts card under either the NITRO REWARDS or the EXPLORE WHAT’S NEW section.

 SteelSeries x KontrolFreek Discounts Card

4. Press Take me there to open the Available Offers window and see your available discounts. 

Take me there Button

5. Select Unlock Code for your preferred discount to reveal your code—you can copy it immediately or return to view it later. 

Unlock Code button in Available Offers window

Using Your Discount Code

After claiming your discount code, here's how to use it on the SteelSeries or KontrolFreek website:

  1. Visit the SteelSeries store or KontrolFreek website
  2. Add items to your cart (minimum $20 purchase required on SteelSeries.com)
  3. Proceed to checkout
  4. Enter your discount code in the promo code field
  5. Complete your purchase with the discount applied

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: I'm a Nitro member but I don't see Nitro Rewards. Why? 

A: Nitro Rewards are rolling out gradually to members. If you don't see them in your Nitro Home yet, they haven't reached your account. All eligible Nitro members will have access over the coming weeks. You can check the eligibility conditions for each perk in the sections above.

Q: Can I contact support to get early access to Nitro Rewards? 

A: Our support team is not able to speed up the rollout or grant early access to individual accounts. You'll receive access once the rollout reaches your account.

Q: Are Nitro Rewards available in my country? 

A: Availability varies by perk. Each partner section above lists the eligible regions. If your country isn't listed for a specific perk, that perk is not currently available in your region.

Q: Do Nitro Rewards cost extra? 

A: No. Nitro Rewards are included with your Nitro membership at no additional cost. Your membership price stays the same.

Q: What happens to my Nitro Rewards if I cancel Nitro? 

A: You'll lose access to all Nitro Rewards perks when your membership ends. Any active partner benefits like Xbox Game Pass will also end.

Q: Do I need an existing Xbox or Microsoft account to use this benefit? 

A: Yes, you'll need a Microsoft account to redeem and access Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition). If you don't have one, you can create one for free at microsoft.com.

Q: What happens to my Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition) access if I cancel my Nitro membership? 

A: Your access to Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition) is tied to your active Nitro membership. If you cancel, you will automatically lose access to this benefit at the end of your current billing period.

Q: Does this benefit stack with an existing Xbox Game Pass subscription? 

A: Xbox Game Pass Starter Edition is intended for Nitro members who do not already have an active Xbox Game Pass subscription. If you already subscribe to Xbox Game Pass, this benefit is notbe applicable.

Q: What counts toward my 10 hours of cloud gaming per month? 

A: Cloud gaming hours are counted from the time you begin streaming a session. Hours reset at the beginning of each calendar month.

Q. Can I play my own games with the 10 hours of cloud gaming?
A: Yes, if a game is cloud playable and you own it digitally with Xbox, you can stream it using your 10 hours of cloud gaming each month.

Q. Can I play from the library of 50+ games on my devices without using my 10 hours of cloud gaming?

A: Yes, you can download and play games on PC, Xbox console, and supported handhelds without impacting your 10 hour cloud gaming limit.

Q: Why does my benefit show as "unavailable"? 

A: If you're seeing "Unavailable," there may be a temporary issue generating access. No action is needed on your end — check back later to claim your benefit.

Q: I think I found a bug. How do I report it?

A: If you're experiencing technical issues or suspect you've encountered a bug, please reach out to Discord Support for help. We can investigate and assist you further.

Q: What happens to my discount code if I cancel my Nitro subscription?

A: Any codes you've already claimed will remain valid until their expiration date, but you won't receive new codes unless you resubscribe to Nitro.

Q: When do the discount codes expire?

A: It depends on the type of code. Monthly codes are valid through the end of the current month. One-time codes (such as for Logitech’s new products and the Pro Series sim line) do not expire and can be redeemed at any time.

Q: Are there any restrictions on the products I can purchase with the discount?

A: Yes, see above for individual product restrictions for each partner discount.

Q: Is there a limit to how many times I can use my discount code?

A: Each discount code can be used once, and you can only use one code per transaction on each website. However, you'll receive a new code each month your Nitro subscription is active.

Q: When exactly do new codes become available?

A: New discount codes become available at the beginning of each calendar month for active Nitro members.

Q: Can I use my code on any device?

A: Yes! Once you receive your code through the Discord desktop app, you can copy it and redeem it at the appropriate webstore on any device of your choice.

Q: Why does my discount code show as "unavailable"?

A: If you’re seeing “Unavailable”, that means there are issues generating discount codes. No action is needed on your end. Check back later to claim your code!

Unavailable Discount Code

Q: Why isn't my discount code working?

A: If you're experiencing issues with your Logitech G discount code, contact their support team directly: https://support.logi.com/hc/en-us 

If you're experiencing issues with your SteelSeries or KontrolFreek discount code, contact their support teams directly:

  • SteelSeries Support: https://support.steelseries.com/hc/en-us 
  • KontrolFreek Support: https://support.kontrolfreek.com/hc/en-us 

Q: I think I found a bug. How do I report it?

A: If you're experiencing technical issues or suspect you've encountered a bug, please reach out to Discord Support for help. We can investigate and assist you further.

articles.name: Country/Region Setting
articles.title: Country/Region Setting
articles.body:
Country/Region is a setting on your Discord account that determines your shopping experience, including what prices and currencies you see, and which payment methods you can add and use.

What this article covers:

  • What is the Country/Region Setting?
  • How is Country/Region Determined
  • Changing Your Country/Region
  • Frequently Asked Questions

What is the Country/Region Setting?

Note: The Country/Region Setting is currently a desktop experiment and is only available to a limited number of users at this time.

Country/Region is a setting on your Discord account that sets your account to a specific location. It determines:

  • The prices and currencies you see in app
  • Which payment methods you can add and use

Country/Region under the Billing tab

How is Country/Region Determined 

Your Country/Region is set the first time you complete a purchase on Discord. Once set, it can only be changed once every 90 days. 

  • Your Country/Region is determined automatically based on your location and any saved payment methods. 
  • Your Country/Region and billing address country must always match to make purchases.
  • On mobile, your region is determined by your device system settings and the app store. 

How to Change Your Country/Region

You can update your Country/Region on your own once every 90 days. To do so, you must:

1. Be located in the new country

2. Add a valid payment method from that country

3. Complete a successful purchase with that payment method

Keep in mind you can only add payment methods that match your Country/Region. If you have a saved method from a different country, it may not work for new purchases once your Country/Region is set.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What happens to my active subscriptions if I change my Country/Region?

A: Your existing subscriptions won't be immediately affected, and they'll keep charging to your original payment method. If that method fails, you'll need to update your payment method and may be asked to acknowledge any pricing differences for your new Country/Region.

Q: I'm traveling and can't complete a purchase. What do I do?

A: This is most likely to happen if you haven't made a purchase on Discord before. On desktop, if your payment method's billing address doesn't match your current location, you'll need to wait until you're back home to complete a purchase. Otherwise, you can try making a purchase through the mobile app.

Q: What if I need to update my Country/Region before 90 days?

A: Your Country/Region can be updated once every 90 days using the steps above. If you're within that window and need to make a change sooner, please reach out to our support team at dis.gd/contact and we'll do our best to help. 

Q: Why is my payment method not available at checkout?

A: Payment methods need to match your account's Country/Region. If there's a mismatch, you'll need to use one that matches your current region.

articles.name: GearUP x Discord
articles.title: GearUP x Discord
articles.body:
Starting from April 22, 2026 (1:00 AM PT) to June 3, 2026 (1:00 AM PT), GearUP users will receive 1 month of Discord Nitro. 

Promotion Summary

Offer Details: 1 month of Discord Nitro

Who is Eligible: Users who have had an active Nitro subscription or Nitro trial in the last 12 months are not eligible to redeem this Nitro promotion.

Note: This promotion is not eligible in the following regions: Syria, Ukraine, Russia, Iran, and North Korea.

We may add additional restrictions from time to time, if you receive an "Unknown Gift Code" error during the claim/redemption process, you are not eligible to redeem this promotion. You can learn more at this Help Center article.

Users who have had a Discord Nitro subscription at any point on their accounts and have had a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscription in the past 12 months are ineligible to redeem this promotion.

If a user has had a Nitro Basic, Nitro Classic, or Server Boosting subscription active on their account and they’ve never had a Nitro subscription, redeeming this promotion will override that subscription.

We will not be able to refund any leftover subscription time from those, and the user will be forfeiting the remainder of the existing subscription when activating the 3 months or 1 month Nitro trial.

Users who have already claimed a gift from this promotion are not eligible to claim further gifts from this promotion.

Requirements: Claim through GearUP by June 3, 2026 1:00 AM PT and redeem in your Discord account by July 3, 2026. An active PS Plus membership is required to claim.

Subscription: After the 1 month period, your Nitro subscription will convert to a monthly recurring subscription, and Discord will bill your payment method per month until you cancel it. You can cancel at any time in your Discord User Settings. 

What this article covers:

  • Promotion Summary
  • What is Discord Nitro?
  • What is GearUP?
  • How do I claim the Nitro Promo from GearUP?
  • How do I redeem the Nitro Trial on my Discord Account? 
    • Eligibility for Redeeming the Nitro Trial
    • Step by Step Redeem Instructions
      • What if I am an Active Nitro Basic, Nitro Classic, or Server Boosting Subscriber? 
  • Frequently Asked Questions
    • Promotion Details
    • Eligibility for the Promotion
    • Payment Info and Subscription Questions
    • Potential Errors and Other Issues

What is Discord Nitro?

Discord Nitro is our subscription plan that gives you access to special perks that’ll make your time on Discord as fun as ever! Personalize and enhance your experience with popular perks like HD streaming, 500MB file uploads, profile and avatar customizations, 2 free Server Boosts, and more:

  • Custom Emojis
  • Discord App Color Themes
  • Super Reactions
  • Avatar Decorations
  • Unique Server Profiles
  • Server Boosts
  • More Nitro & Nitro Basic perks

What is GearUP?

GearUP is an intelligent network optimization tool that uses artificial intelligence to analyze network traffic in real time. By connecting through the optimal network path, it lowers ping and reduces latency, thereby improving the smoothness of online gameplay. Its proprietary Adaptive Intelligent Routing technology can effectively handle sudden network jitter and maintain connection stability at all times. This advanced optimization is available for over 3,000 games across PC, mobile, and console platforms.

How do I claim the Nitro Promo from GearUP?

Check GearUP’s promotion page for platform-specific guides, or simply download GearUP from their official website to find the promo banner on the homepage during the promotional period.

How do I redeem the Nitro Trial on my Discord Account?

Once you have claimed the promo, you'll now need to officially redeem this promo on your Discord account. You must redeem this Nitro trial by June 9, 2026 (1:00 AM PT).

Eligibility for Redeeming the Nitro Trial

Note: This promotion is not eligible in the following regions: Syria, Ukraine, Russia, Iran, and North Korea.

If you receive an "Unknown Gift Code" error during the claim/redemption process, you are not eligible to redeem this promotion. You can learn more at this Help Center article.

Users who have had an active Nitro subscription or Nitro trial in the last 12 months are not eligible to redeem this Nitro promotion.

Users who have had a Discord Nitro subscription at any point on their accounts and have had a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscription in the past 12 months are ineligible to redeem this promotion.

If a user has had a Nitro Basic, Nitro Classic, or Server Boosting subscription active on their account and they’ve never had a Nitro subscription, redeeming this promotion will override that subscription.

Users who have already claimed a gift from this promotion are not eligible to claim further gifts from this promotion.

Step by Step Redeem Instructions

If you're eligible and ready to redeem this Nitro subscription on your own Discord account, you can follow these steps below to redeem the promo.

Note: 
- Before redeeming Nitro, make sure you are logged in your own Discord account.
- If you accidentally redeemed the Nitro promo on an account that is not yours, we are unable to provide you with another promo.

Step 1 - Logging into Discord

  •  If you're not already logged into Discord in your browser, you will then be automatically redirected to either:

Create an account Page (Left) and Login Page (Right)

Step 2 - Claiming your promotion gift

Once you have logged in to your account, you will see a message asking you to claim your promotion gift. 

The account you are currently logged in as will receive this gift. This gift cannot be shared with a friend and once claimed, the gift cannot be switched to a different user, so be sure you are on the account you want to claim the gift for. If you want to change to a different account, press on the Switch Accounts.

Press on Next when you’re ready to redeem your gift on your chosen account.

Claim your gifts! Window

Step 3 - Redeeming your promotion gift

Review the details of the promotion then press on Next. 

Offer Confirmation Window

Note: If you switch to a different account at this step, you will not be able to claim and redeem the promotion on the account you switched to.

Make sure your payment information is accurate. If your Discord account does not have your payment information, please fill out your payment details. You will not be charged until the trial ends and the subscription renews.

Payment Information

When you've filled out all the necessary information and you're ready to redeem this promotion, press the confirmation button.

Step 4 - Subscription Now Activated

After accepting the promo to your account, you'll now be automatically redirected to your Subscriptions tab in your User Settings to see your newly activated Nitro subscription on your account.

What if I am an Active Nitro Basic, Nitro Classic, or Server Boosting Subscriber? 

Just to clarify - if you have had a Discord Nitro subscription at any point on your account and have had a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscription in the past 12 months, you are ineligible to redeem this promotion.

So long as you have had a Nitro Basic, Nitro Classic, or Server Boosting subscription active on your account and you’ve never had a subscription, you will be able to redeem this promotion and replace it with the 1 month Nitro subscription.

Important: By choosing to activate this 1 month trial, you will lose any features associated with your current subscriptions, and **you will not receive a refund for any remaining value on your current subscription**.

At the end of the promotion period, you'll be converted to a paying Nitro subscription per month unless you cancel your subscription.

Frequently Asked Questions

We know there's a lot of information to unpack on this promotion above, so we've also broken down this information in this FAQ section as well too.

  • Promotion Details
  • Eligibility for the Promotion
  • Payment Info and Subscription Questions
  • Potential Errors and Other Issues
    • Already Had/Have Nitro
    • Already Redeemed
    • Something's Wrong Here

Promotion Details

Q: How long does this promotion run for?

A: GearUP subscribers can claim Discord Nitro promo between April 22, 2026 (1:00 AM PT) to June 3, 2026 (1:00 AM PT).

After July 3, 2026, GearUP users will no longer be able to claim a trial promo.

Q: How long does the Discord Nitro promotion last for?

A: You must redeem the Nitro promotion by July 3, 2026 (1:00 AM PT).

If a code has not been redeemed to the Discord account by July 3, 2026 (1:00 AM PT), it will expire and you will no longer be able to have 1 month of Discord Nitro.

Eligibility for the Promotion

Q: Who can claim this promotion from their GearUP account?

A: Any registered GearUP user can join in! Head over to GearUP Promotion Page to learn more about the rules and how to get started.

Q: Who can redeem this Nitro trial to their Discord account?

A: Users who have never had an active Nitro subscription on their Discord accounts are eligible to redeem this Nitro promotion.

Additionally, users who previously had a Discord Nitro subscription and have had a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscription in the past 12 months are ineligible.

This promotion is not available in the following regions: Syria, Ukraine, Russia, Iran, and North Korea. If you receive an "Unknown Gift Code" error during the claim/redemption process, you are not eligible to redeem this promotion. You can learn more at this Help Center article.

Q: What if I'm a current or previous Nitro Basic, Nitro Classic, or a Server Boost subscription? Can I also take part in this promotion? 

A: If you previously had a Discord Nitro subscription at any point on your accounts and have had a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscription in the past 12 months, you are ineligible to redeem this promotion.

If you have had a Nitro Basic, Nitro Classic, or Server Boosting subscription active on your account and you’ve never had a Nitro subscription,  you will be able to redeem this promotion and replace it with the 1 month Nitro subscription.

Important: By choosing to activate this 1 month trial, you will lose any features associated with your current subscriptions, and **you will not receive a refund for any remaining value on your current subscription**.

At the end of the promotion period, you'll be converted to a paying Nitro subscription per month unless you cancel your subscription.

Payment Info and Subscription Questions

Q: Why do I need to submit my payment info to redeem Nitro?

A: Because Nitro is a subscription plan, at the end of your 1 month trial, we will start your first billing cycle so you can continue to enjoy Nitro on Discord.

However, you can cancel the Nitro subscription at any time before the end of the 1 month.

Q: Why do I see a temporary hold/charge on my account when this is supposed to be a free promotion?

A: Just to clarify, this Nitro promotion is free, however, there will be a temporary hold placed on the payment method upon activating the promotion. This is to help Discord confirm the payment method works as expected and to prevent the use of fraudulent payment methods. This charge will appear in your Discord transaction history, and it may appear as a hold on your payment method.

We immediately reverse the temporary hold, and you’ll see that reflected in your Discord transaction history. Your bank may take longer to remove the hold from your payment method.

Note: Banks will usually remove the temporary hold from your account within a few business days.

If your Discord transaction history does not show the hold released after 5 business days, please let us know at https://dis.gd/contact, and our support team will be able to investigate this issue further.

Potential Errors and Other Issues

Q: I see a "Oh no! It looks like you have Nitro already" error when I try to redeem my Nitro promo.

A: If you're seeing an "Oh no! It looks like you have Nitro already" error, that means that the Discord account you're trying to redeem this promotion on currently has a Nitro subscription so it is ineligible for this Nitro promotion.

Please make sure you're logged into the account that you want to redeem this promotion on.

Q: I see a "Sorry, looks like you’ve already had a Nitro sub!" error when I try to redeem my Nitro promo.

A: If you're seeing an “Sorry, looks like you’ve already had a Nitro sub” error, that means that you've previously subscribed to Nitro on your Discord account and you won't be able to redeem this 1 month perk.

If you have never subscribed to Nitro, please submit a ticket through our support system: https://dis.gd/contact and our support team will be able to investigate further.

Be sure to include your full Discord ID and email address tied to your Discord account.

Q: I see a "Looks like this gift has already been claimed" error when I try to claim my Nitro promo.

A: If you are seeing a "Looks like this gift has already been claimed" error, that means that the Nitro promo has already been used and cannot be used again. You may need to double check if you've claimed this promo on another Discord account.

Unfortunately, once the promo has been claimed, the promo cannot be re-enabled, and the Nitro cannot be transferred from one account to another.

Q: I see a "Wait a Second...Looks like this code didn't work." error when I try to redeem my Nitro promo.

A: If you're seeing an “Wait a Second...Looks like this code didn't work.” error, that means that the promo is invalid.

Please note that our support team is unable to intervene if you are given an invalid promo and we will not be able to provide a new promo.

Q: I see a “Looks like something went wrong” error when I click on “Next”.

A: There are several reasons why you may be seeing this error:

  • You are ineligible for this promotion
  • The promotion is invalid
  • The promotion has reached the maximum number of claims
  • The link is invalid

Please note that the Discord support team is not able to assist if you run into this error when attempting to redeem. See the list above for possible reasons why your account may be ineligible or otherwise unable to redeem this promotion.

Q: I see a "Sorry, This Payment Source Cannot Be Used for Redemption" error when trying to redeem my promo!

A: If you're seeing a "Sorry, This Payment Source Cannot Be Used for Redemption" error, that means that the payment method you've selected to cover the temporary $1 hold cannot be used for that purpose. 

Please keep in mind that prepaid payment methods, such as Gcash, cannot be used to cover temporary holds due to the nature of how prepaid payment methods function.

For more information on temporary holds, please check out this article!

Q: I see a “Looks like this promotion has reached its maximum number of claims” error when trying to redeem my promo!

A: If you are seeing a “Looks like this promotion has reached its maximum number of claims” error, that means the maximum limit for claims of this promotion has been reached and this promotion can no longer be claimed. If you have claimed this Nitro promotion, you are still able to redeem it to your Discord account!

Please note that the support team is unable to assist you if you run into this error and we are not able to increase the limit of claims.

Q: I see a “Looks like your email isn’t verified. Make sure to verify your email before claiming this gift.”

A: If you are seeing a “Looks like your email isn’t verified, make sure to verify your email before claiming this gift” error, you are trying to redeem this Nitro promotion on a Discord account with an email that hasn’t been verified yet.

You can check out this support article on how to resend the email verification for your Discord account. If you need help setting up your Discord account, you can read our Getting Started article. 

Q: I’m having trouble with my GearUP account.

A: If you encounter any issues with your GearUP account, please refer to the guides below to submit feedback directly through the GearUP platform:

  • PC
  • Mobile
  • Console

articles.name: Discord Nitro Logitech Discount
articles.title: Discord Nitro Logitech Discount
articles.body:
Level up your gaming setup with an exclusive Logitech discount, available just for Discord Nitro members! Read on to find out how to take advantage of this special offer.

What this article covers:

  • What is the Logitech Nitro Discount?
  • How it Works
  • Eligibility Requirements
  • How to Access Your Logitech Discount
  • Using Your Discount Code
  • Frequently Asked Questions

What is the Nitro Logitech Discount?

As a Nitro subscriber, you’ll get one new discount code each month that you’re subscribed to Nitro: 

  • 30% off purchases at the Logitech store (excluding new products and PRO Series lines)
  • 5% off new products for the first 6 months that the product is available. Limited to 1 discount per customer.
Important: To receive your code, you must use the desktop app. Nitro Basic and Nitro Classic are not eligible.

How it Works

The following details apply to this promotional offer:

  • Code details and restrictions: Discount codes are valid on most items in each store, including sale items, with no blackout dates. Please note that the Logitech 30% off code excludes new products, the new Pro X2 Superstrike mouse and PRO Series Simulation lines, and is limited to 3 items per order.
  • For new products and PRO series simulation gear items, a 5% discount is available on new products for the first 6 months following a product's release (limited to 1 use per customer). The PRO series simulation gear discount is rolling out to all users in the upcoming days.
  • Immediate availability: Codes become available to eligible users as soon as you subscribe to Nitro and must be claimed in your Nitro Home.
  • Fresh codes monthly: Each calendar month, you can claim a new discount code as long as your Nitro subscription remains active.
  • Code expiration: The code expiration dates can be found in the app. Codes will always expire on that date, no matter when they were granted.
  • No code stacking: Only one code can be used per transaction.
Note: If you cancel your Nitro subscription, you can still use any previously claimed discount codes until they expire, but you won't receive new codes until you resubscribe.

Eligibility Requirements

You are eligible:

  • With an active Discord Nitro subscription
  • If you’re located in a region that Logitech ships to (see Logitech regions for details)

You are not eligible if:

  • You’re using a Nitro gift, or using Nitro Credits without a Nitro subscription. 
  • You are a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscriber.
Note: For new Nitro members, once you unlock a discount code, you will not be eligible for a refund on your Nitro subscription. See our Refund Policy for more details.

How to Access Your Logitech Discount

1. On desktop or browser, select the Direct Messages icon [] in the upper-left corner. 

2. Press the Nitro Home tab to navigate to the Nitro page. 

 

Direct Messages Icon (Left) and Nitro Home Tab (Right)

3. Locate and select the Logitech Discount card under the What’s New? section.

 Logitech Discount Card

4. Press Unlock Rewards to open the Logitech Discounts window and see your available codes. 

Unlock Rewards button

5. Select Unlock Code for your preferred discount to reveal your code—you can copy it immediately or return to view it later. 

Unlock Code button in Logitech Discounts window

Using Your Discount Code

After claiming your discount code, here's how to use it on the Logitech:

  1. Visit the Logitech website
  2. Add items to your cart 
  3. Proceed to checkout
  4. Enter your discount code in the promo code field
  5. Complete your purchase with the discount applied

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What happens to my discount code if I cancel my Nitro subscription?

A: Any codes you've already claimed will remain valid until their expiration date, but you won't receive new codes unless you resubscribe to Nitro.

Q: Where can I find the expiration date for my discount code?

A: The expiration date for each discount will appear on the discount card once you press Unlock Code in the Available Offers window. 

Q: Are there any restrictions on the products I can purchase with the discount?

A: The 30% off discount code is valid on most products in the Logitech store, including sale items, with no blackout dates. Please note that the 30% off code excludes new products, the Pro X2 Superstrike mouse, and PRO Series Simulation items, and is limited to 3 items per order. However, a 5% discount code can be applied to new products and PRO Series Simulation products during the first six months following a product's release.

Q: Is there a limit to how many times I can use my discount code?

A: Each discount code can be used once, and you can only use one code per transaction on each website. However, you'll receive a new code each month your Nitro subscription is active.

Q: When exactly do new codes become available?

A: New discount codes become available at the beginning of each calendar month for active Nitro members.

Q: Can I use my code on any device?

A: Yes! Once you receive your code through the Discord desktop app, you can copy it and redeem it at the appropriate webstore on any device of your choice.

Q: Why does my discount code show as "unavailable"?

A: If you’re seeing “Unavailable”, that means there are issues generating discount codes. No action is needed on your end. Check back later to claim your code!

Unavailable Discount Code

Q: Why isn't my discount code working?

A: If you're experiencing issues with your Logitech discount code, contact their support team directly: https://support.logi.com/hc/en-us 

Q: I think I found a bug. How do I report it?

A: If you're experiencing technical issues or suspect you've encountered a bug, please reach out to Discord Support for help. We can investigate and assist you further.

articles.name: What is the Take It Down Act (TIDA)
articles.title: What is the Take It Down Act (TIDA)
articles.body:
The Take It Down Act (TIDA) is a law that allows certain individuals to request the removal of intimate images shared or created without their consent, sometimes referred to as “revenge porn” or “non-consensual pornography.” It requires covered platforms, like Discord, to provide a clear reporting process, review qualifying removal requests, remove covered content within a defined timeframe, and take reasonable steps to limit the spread of that content.

Your Rights and Our Responsibilities Under TIDA

If you are authorized to make a request under TIDA, you, or a representative acting on your behalf, may:

  • Notify Discord of any “non-consensual intimate visual depiction” published on Discord that depicts you and was published without your consent; and,
  • Submit a request for Discord to remove the depiction. For more details about how to submit a removal request, you can refer to our help article.

So that we can help you, please make sure that your TIDA removal request meets these requirements:

  • You are identifiable in the content or via the context in which it is displayed (for example, your face is visible or your name is mentioned);
  • The content shows you nude or engaged in sexual activity; and,
  • The content was published without your consent.

Discord may also action content submitted for removal through this process even if it does not meet the criteria under the Take It Down Act such as for violation of our Community Guidelines, or where other laws may apply.

Under TIDA, Discord, as a covered platform, is required to:

  • Maintain a clear and accessible process that allows a depicted individual (or their authorized representative) to request the removal of non-consensual intimate visual depictions;
  • Review each removal request and determine whether it satisfies the requirements of the law;
  • Remove the reported content within the 48 hour time period required by law when a valid request is received; and,
  • Make reasonable efforts to identify and remove known copies of the same non-consensual intimate visual depiction.

What to Expect After You Submit a Removal Request Under TIDA

We will promptly review your removal request to confirm that it meets the requirements of TIDA. If the request is complete and valid, we will remove the reported content within 48 hours. We will also make reasonable efforts to identify and remove known copies of the content.

If your submission is incomplete, we may be unable to process your request until sufficient information is provided.

articles.name: Nitro Rewards
articles.title: Nitro Rewards
articles.body:
Nitro is expanding its perks beyond Discord with Nitro Rewards, a third-party benefits program included with your membership. From games to gear, these are perks built for how you play.

What this article covers:

  • What are Nitro Rewards?
  • Xbox Game Pass 
  • Logitech G Discount
    • How it Works
    • Eligibility Requirements
    • How to Access Your Discount Code
  • SteelSeries Discount
    • How it Works
    • Eligibility Requirements
    • How to Access Your Discount Code
  • Frequently Asked Questions

What are Nitro Rewards?

Important: Nitro Rewards are rolling out to eligible members over the coming weeks. If you don't see Nitro Rewards in the Nitro tab yet, they haven't reached your account. All eligible Nitro members will have access soon. Perk availability varies by region. Nitro Basic and Nitro Classic members are not eligible.

Nitro Rewards is a benefits program included with your Nitro membership at no additional cost. It gives members access to perks from partners that matter to people who play games.

Nitro Rewards will evolve and change over time. You can check your Nitro Home to see what's currently available to you. As long as your Nitro membership is active, you'll have access to whatever perks are currently available in your rewards collection.

For a full list of the other perks you get with Nitro, check out What are Nitro & Nitro Basic? Article.

You can access Nitro Rewards through your Nitro Home tab in the Discord desktop app.

Nitro Home tab

Nitro Rewards Program Terms 

Nitro Rewards is included with eligible paid Nitro memberships at no additional cost, giving you access to perks from partners we think you'll actually use. The program is designed to grow and evolve — we'll be updating the partners and offers over time, and what's available may change.

Individual perks have their own eligibility conditions, redemption requirements, and availability limitations, which you'll find described in connection with each perk. Not all perks are available in all regions or to all subscription types. Nitro Basic and Nitro Classic members are not eligible for Nitro Rewards.

Perks provided through Nitro Rewards are supplementary to your core Nitro benefits and are offered in partnership with third parties. Discord isn't responsible for third-party products or services accessed through the program, and the third parties may impose their own terms, restrictions, and limitations.

Access to Nitro Rewards perks requires an active Nitro membership. Some perks, once claimed, may remain valid after your membership ends per the terms applicable to that perk.

Xbox Game Pass 

Take your gaming further with Xbox Game Pass, included with your Nitro membership. Whether you're looking for something new to play or want to stream your existing Xbox library, this benefit puts more gaming within reach — no extra subscription needed.

Your Nitro membership includes:

  • 50+ games like Stardew Valley, DayZ, and Fallout 4
  • 10 hours of cloud gaming each month
  • Play and earn up to $25 a year in the Store with Rewards

This benefit is available to active Nitro subscribers in eligible regions that do not have an existing Xbox Game Pass subscription.

Eligibility Requirements

You are eligible if:

  • You have an active Discord Nitro membership (through a paid membership, Nitro gift, and most Nitro trials)
  • You are not an existing Xbox Game Pass subscriber
  • You are located in an eligible region (see below)

You are not eligible if:

  • Using Nitro Credits without a Nitro subscription. 
  • You are a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic member

Eligible regions for Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition): Australia, Austria, Belgium, Canada, Czech Republic, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Hungary, India, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Mexico, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Slovakia, South Korea, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Kingdom, United States

See Xbox Game Pass (Starter Edition) terms: https://www.xbox.com/legal/starter-edition-terms 

How to Access Xbox Game Pass

Tip: If you have an existing Xbox account connected to Discord but aren't seeing your Xbox Game Pass Nitro benefits, try re-linking your account. This can happen for some users with previously connected accounts. Re-linking should resolve the issue.

1. On desktop or browser, select the Direct Messages icon [] in the upper-left corner. 

2. Press the Nitro Home tab to navigate to the Nitro Rewards page. 

 

Direct Messages Icon (Left) and Nitro Tab (Right)

3. Locate the Xbox Game Pass card or banner and press Claim to open the Xbox Game Pass window.

Claim for free Xbox Game Pass card

5. Follow the prompts to activate your benefit and link your Microsoft account. 

Logitech G Discount  

Important: To receive your code, you must use the desktop app. Eligibility conditions apply, see below for more information.

How it Works

The following terms apply to this promotional offer:

  • Code details and restrictions: Discount codes are valid on most items in each store, including sale items, with no blackout dates. Please note that the Logitech 30% off code excludes new products, the new Pro X2 Superstrike mouse and PRO Series Simulation lines, and is limited to 3 items per order.
  • For new products and PRO series simulation gear items, a 5% discount is available on new products for the first 6 months following a product's release (limited to 1 use per customer). The PRO series simulation gear discount is rolling out to all users in the upcoming days.
  • Immediate availability: Codes become available to eligible users as soon as you subscribe to Nitro and must be claimed in your Nitro Home.
  • Fresh codes monthly: Each calendar month, you can claim a new discount code as long as this reward is available.
  • Code expiration: The code expiration dates can be found in the app. Codes will always expire on that date, no matter when they were granted.
  • No code stacking: Only one code can be used per transaction.
Note: If you cancel your Nitro subscription, you can still use any previously claimed discount codes until they expire, but you won't receive new codes until you resubscribe.

Eligibility Requirements

You are eligible:

  • With an active Discord Nitro subscription (through a paid membership, Nitro gift, and most Nitro trials)
  • If you’re located in a region that Logitech G ships to (see Logitech G regions for details)

You are not eligible if:

  • Using Nitro Credits without a Nitro subscription. 
  • You are a Nitro Classic or Nitro Basic subscriber.
Note: Once you unlock a discount code, you will not be eligible for a refund on your Nitro subscription. See our Refund Policy for more details.

How to Access Your Discount Code

1. On desktop or browser, select the Direct Messages icon [] in the upper-left corner. 

2. Press the Nitro Home tab to navigate to the Nitro page. 

 

Direct Messages Icon (Left) and Nitro Home Tab (Right)

3. Locate and select the Logitech G Discount card under the What’s New? section.

 Logitech G Discount Card

4. Press Unlock Rewards to open the Logitech G Discounts window and see your available codes. 

Unlock Rewards button

5. Select Unlock Code for your preferred discount to reveal your code—you can copy it immediately or return to view it later. 

Unlock Code button in Logitech G Discounts window

Using Your Discount Code

After claiming your discount code, here's how to use it on the Logitech G website:

  1. Visit the Logitech G website
  2. Add items to your cart 
  3. Proceed to checkout
  4. Enter your discount code in the promo code field
  5. Complete your purchase with the discount applied

SteelSeries Discount

Important: To receive your code, you must use the desktop app. Eligibility conditions apply, see below for more information.

How it Works

The following details apply to this promotional offer:
